## Quick Reference

This is an Obsidian vault managed with git. Notes are markdown files with YAML frontmatter.

## Vault Conventions

- Frontmatter required fields: ${REQUIRED_FIELDS}
- Date format: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Daily notes location: ${DAILY_NOTES_FOLDER}
- Templates location: ${TEMPLATES_FOLDER}
- Attachments location: ${ATTACHMENTS_FOLDER}

## Working Conventions

- All notes must have valid YAML frontmatter
- Use wikilinks (`[[note]]`) for internal links
- Run the quality gate before completing any task
- Do NOT edit files in `.obsidian/` unless specifically asked

## Companion Skills

Consider installing [kepano/obsidian-skills](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills) for additional Obsidian-specific capabilities.
